items.q: Where are the main buildings on campus?
items.a: The Admin Building (ID cards, Student Affairs, Finance) is at the main entrance. The Library Building (library + IT Helpdesk) is directly behind it. Lecture Halls are in the East Wing, and the Hostel blocks and Cafeteria are on the West side of campus.
The main Cafeteria is on the West side of campus, next to the hostel blocks, open 7 AM to 8 PM daily.

items.q: Where do I find the Finance Office?
items.a: The Finance Office is on the ground floor of the Admin Building, right next to the ID card counter.
